{# _ownership_badge.html — Strategic vendor ownership claim/release badge. Shows owner name + expiry countdown when claimed; Claim button when open pool. All mutations HTMX-swap this container outerHTML. Receives: vendor_id (int), ownership (dict|None from get_vendor_status), user (User). Called by: vendors/detail.html (hx-get lazy load), vendor_claim/release routes. Depends on: htmx_views.py vendor_claim/release/ownership_badge routes. #}
{% if ownership %} {# Claimed — show owner + expiry + release button (only owner or admin) #}
Strategic — {{ ownership.owner_name or 'Unknown' }} ({{ ownership.days_remaining }}d left) {% if user.id == ownership.owner_user_id or user.role == 'admin' %} {% endif %}
{% else %} {# Open pool — show Claim button #} {% endif %}
